title: [Snyk Code] Jinja auto-escape is set to false.
description:
## Jinja auto-escape is set to false.

**Severity:** medium
**Project:** `AnthusAI/Plexus`
**File:** `plexus/scores/composite/GoogleGemini.py`
**Location:** line 293, column 34 to line 293, column 45
**Classes:** CWE-CWE-79
### Snippet (plexus/scores/composite/GoogleGemini.py:291-295)
```
 291 |         context = self.get_element_by_name(name='context')['prompt']
 292 |  
 293 |         system_prompt_template = Environment().from_string(context)
 294 |         context = system_prompt_template.render(transcript=transcript)
 295 | 
```

**Issue Key:** ba205916-9148-4006-8f50-5dd2f0fd472e

### Details
Jinja auto-escape is set to false.

**Fix:** Review and remediate in code.
